name: nvidia_triton
explanation: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server exposes Prometheus metrics on a fixed `/metrics` path at the documented default port 8002 (configured via `--metrics-port`). The check is an OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 subclass requiring just `openmetrics_endpoint`. The optional companion HTTP API (port 8000) is used only for version/health metadata and is enabled by default but not required for the core OpenMetrics scrape. Pattern A: single canonical OpenMetrics URL with fixed default port — straightforward openmetrics-port-scan candidate. No existing auto_conf.yaml on disk.
notes: The companion port 8000 (HTTP API) is used for server-info enrichment; if not reachable the check still works for OpenMetrics scraping.
